final:
module four_input_gate (
    input  A1  ,
    input  A2  ,
    input  B1  ,
    input  C1  ,
    output X   
);

    assign X = (A1 & A2) | (~A1 & B1) | (~A1 & ~B1 & C1);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= A1; if (A2) X <= B1; else X <= C1;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: X <= A1; if (A2) X <= B1; else X <= C1;
